rationale.R1.3: The output flags at least one claim (eliminates self-preference bias) the evidence does not support but does not audit every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure.
rationale.RX.1: The output does not mark confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers mostly within scope with one drift.
rationale.RX.4: The output is harm-free but with one minor regression (train/test contamination risk).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is not annotated with source and reason.
